steps.title: Identify the temporal relationship
steps.content: The passage presents two events with explicit dates: the 2014 competition win and the 2017 show creation. These are separate moments in time, and the transition must signal this sequence.

steps.title: Match the temporal signal
steps.content: ”Later” directly expresses that the second event came after the first, moving from 2014 to 2017. “Instead” implies a switch or contrast (absent here), “For example” implies an illustrative relationship (these aren't example and general rule), and “In other words” implies restatement (the events are distinct, not equivalent). That matches choice C — C is correct.
